---
title: "Gapminder: Life, Wealth, and Population"
---

Gapminder is a dataset tracking life expectancy, population, and GDP per capita for 142 countries from 1952 to 2007 (every 5 years).

## Pages
- [Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita](life-gdp.qmd)
- [Life Expectancy and Population](life-population.qmd)
- [Country Analysis](country.qmd)
